heading: Survivors’ and dependents’ educational assistance
label: 3976 Survivors’ and dependents’ educational assistance
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b), was in the original “section 140(d) of the Foreign Relations Authorization Act, Fiscal Years 1998 and 1999”, and was translated as meaning “section 140(d) of the Foreign Relations Authorization Act, Fiscal Years 1988 and 1989”, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 2656f(d) of this title

Effective DateSection applicable in the case of a Foreign Service or executive branch employee subject to the authority of the chief of mission pursuant to , serving at a United States diplomatic or consular mission abroad, who died on or after , as a result of injuries from an act of terrorism, as defined in , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2014 Amendment note under .section 3927 of this titlesection 2656f(d) of this titlesection 7082(c) of Pub. children.heading: Foreign Service employees
children.label: a Foreign Service employees
children.text: The Secretary shall, pursuant to guidance issued under , provide educational assistance to a beneficiary of any United States national Foreign Service employee who dies while on duty abroad as a result of an act of terrorism, as defined in , to meet, in whole or in part, the expenses incurred by the beneficiary in pursuing a program of education at an educational institution, including subsistence, tuition, fees, supplies, books, equipment, and other educational costs.section 3973(c) of this titlesection 2656f(d) of this title

children.heading: Other executive agencies
children.label: b Other executive agencies
children.text: The head of an executive agency shall, pursuant to guidance issued under provide educational assistance authorized by this section to a beneficiary of any employee of that agency who dies as a result of an act of terrorism or terrorism, as defined in , while on duty abroad and subject to the authority of the chief of mission pursuant to .section 3973(c) of this titlesection 2656f(d) of this titlesection 3927 of this title

children.heading: Amount of assistance
children.label: c Amount of assistance
children.text: Educational assistance under this section may be made available up to the amounts provided for in , as adjusted by , and for an aggregate period not in excess of 48 months.section 3532 of title 38section 3564 of title 38

children.heading: Program of education and educational institution defined
children.label: d Program of education and educational institution defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the terms “program of education” and “educational institution” have the meanings given the terms in .section 3501 of title 38
